title: Neduvaali Lyrics Osthi Osthe Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Singers: Rahul Nambiar, Mahathi
Song: Nedvaali
Lyrics : Yuga Bharath
Movie: Osthi
Music : Thaman s

Neduvaali.. adiye neduvaali..
udumba udumba
Ammaadi nenja neeyum kavvi poriye

Neduvaali.. adiye neduvaali..
arumba arumba
ayaiyo enna neeyum killi poriye

Ada dumeeludthaan ada dumeeludhaan
avan gunnula suttaa dumeeludhaan
Ada dammaaludhaan ada dammaaludhaan
ava kannula sutta, kannula sutta

Vari variya, thala mudiye
iva azhagula naanga thaangurome adiye
Maniya maniya, iru vizhiye
iva nadaiyila neenga maaruveenga vazhiye

Hey hey hey koodudhu aasai thoonudhu pesa
maaridudhe buthi
Dhaavaniyil eriyarame pathi
Indha paya pula azhaga ne manasula manasula
edukanum aarathi

Ada dumeeludthaan ada dumeeludhaan
mavan gunnula suttaa dumeeludhaan
Ada dammaaludhaan ada dammaaludhaan
maami kannula sutta dammaaludhaan

Neduvaali.. adiye neduvaali..
kannula sutta, kannula sutta

Unga control il oora vaipeengale
ippa control illaama poreengale
kuri thappaama nethu suttenada
ippa kannaala soodu pattenadaa

Sema dhillaana aalu summa illa
udambengenyum moola poiye illa
idhu pollatha casesu aana illa

hey hey hey kaavalu kaaka vendiya aala kaanala paarappa
fire-ra odane podappa
Ada orusana nodiyila thirudana pudikira
manasa nee thedappa  (Ada dumeeluthaan ....)

Indha pennaala thookam ketaarunga
edhum unnaama yekkam kondaarunga
nadu saamathil rondhu povingale
ippa roomkul rondhu poringale

Pala seivora pottu setharunga
olungilaama pootum pottarunga
ipa ultava maari ponaarunga..

hey hey hey aalam therinju kaalayum vacha
dhillae irukaadhu
thedi vandha muthum kidaikaadhu
Thuni thunichal manasula irukura variyile
thappu onnum nadakaadhu   (Ada dumeeluthaan ....)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Neduvaali?

The song Neduvaali expresses themes of love and affection, celebrating the bond between lovers.

What is the context of the song in the movie Osthi?

In Osthi, the song plays during a romantic sequence, highlighting the chemistry between the lead characters.

Who are the singers of Neduvaali?

The song is sung by Mahathi and Rahul Nambiar, whose voices complement each other beautifully.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Neduvaali was composed by Thaman S, known for his catchy and vibrant tunes.

When was Neduvaali released?

Neduvaali was released on October 23, 2011, as part of the Osthi soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Neduvaali, the vibrant duet captures the essence of youthful love and joy, making it a perfect fit for celebratory moments. The song showcases the playful banter between the lovers, filled with affection and warmth. With its catchy tune and engaging lyrics, it evokes feelings of happiness and romance, making it a favorite among fans. The collaboration of Mahathi and Rahul Nambiar, under the musical direction of Thaman S, adds a unique charm to this delightful track.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Neduvaali from the movie Osthi is a vibrant duet that beautifully captures the essence of romance and celebration. With the enchanting voices of Mahathi and Rahul Nambiar, paired with Thaman S's catchy composition, this song is sure to uplift your spirits. Dive into the melodious world of Neduvaali and let its joyful vibes resonate with your heart!
stanzaMeanings: Neduvaali.. my Neduvaali.. your heart is like a drum, will you dance?
Neduvaali.. my Neduvaali.. oh my, will you be a little bird?
Oh, he is making noise, he is making noise, he is making a sound in his praises. Oh, she is making noise, she is making noise, she is making a sound in her eyes, in her eyes.
Are you coming, with your beautiful hair, we will carry these beauties. Oh my, oh my, with your two eyes, you will not change your path.
Hey hey hey, the desire is rising, the words are changing, but the mind is still. In this life, I need to take this beautiful child in my heart.
Oh, he is making noise, he is making noise, he is making a sound in his praises. Oh, she is making noise, she is making noise, she is making a sound in her eyes, in her eyes.
Neduvaali.. my Neduvaali.. she is making a sound in her eyes, in her eyes.
You are controlling the area, now you are going without control. I made a mistake yesterday, now I am feeling the pain in my eyes.
There are people who are not just ordinary, they are not just bodies, this is not a bad case, but it is not good either.
Hey hey hey, the one who needs to guard is not visible, look at the fire, it will burn. In this village, the thief is hiding, you are searching for him (Oh, he is making noise...).
This girl is asking for sleep, whatever you do, she is holding on. In the middle of the town, they have gone to the room, now they are coming out.
Many people are putting on a show, they are not good, they are just pretending, now they have changed their ways..
Hey hey hey, the world is not easy, it is not easy to find a pearl that has come. In the mind, there is nothing wrong happening in the thoughts (Oh, he is making noise...).
